author: Your Name
title: Your Blog
description: A bilingual personal blog for engineering notes, projects, tools, and durable ideas.
intro: This site collects technical notes, project write-ups, tools, and long-running ideas. Chinese comes first; English versions will grow over time.
about: This is a personal blog built for long-term writing and project notes. The first version focuses on structure, publishing, search, RSS, comment placeholders, and bilingual content flow.
The site stays intentionally lightweight: useful notes first, extra polish later as real writing accumulates.
